name: window_close_stops_whole_house_fan
description: Whole-house fan running outside nat-vent (e.g., started by min-runtime cycle). When all sensors close, the fan must stop to prevent drawing outdoor air through the closed envelope. Fix D covers this path.
notes: Covers Fix D: handle_all_doors_windows_closed must stop the whole-house fan even when nat-vent was NOT the trigger.
The fan is already active (_fan_active=True) but _natural_vent_active=False.
This differs from the whole_house_fan_hvac_suppression scenario where nat-vent IS the trigger.
Without Fix D, the fan runs indefinitely after windows close, drawing in outdoor air that may be hot or humid.
Mild warm day where indoor is already in band — HVAC is off by classification.

events.note: Early morning: outdoor=71F is too warm for nat-vent (< indoor=72F but threshold = 74+3=77F... wait, outdoor=71F < indoor=72F means nat-vent COULD engage). Use warm outdoor.
User opens a window. Outdoor=71F is close to indoor=72F. Nat-vent may engage depending on conditions.
Outdoor warmed above indoor — nat-vent exit conditions met. Fan was running via min-runtime cycle (not nat-vent). _natural_vent_active=False, _fan_active=True after this point.
All sensors close. Fix D: whole-house fan must stop since _fan_active=True and _natural_vent_active=False.

assertions.reason: Window opened with outdoor=71F < indoor=72F — nat-vent activates (outdoor <= threshold 77F). Whole-house fan activates.
outdoor=72.5F >= indoor=72F — nat-vent outdoor-rise exit fires. Fan may remain active for min-runtime cycle but _natural_vent_active=False.
All sensors closed. Fix D stops the whole-house fan since _fan_active=True and _natural_vent_active=False. resumed is emitted by sensor_all_closed handling.

verdict.summary: Whole-house fan stops on sensor close when running outside nat-vent (Fix D)
verdict.observed_behavior: natural_ventilation on open → nat_vent_outdoor_rise_exit when outdoor warms → resumed on sensor close (fan stopped by Fix D)
verdict.expected_behavior: Fan stops when sensors close regardless of how it was activated
